mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_product p
AND p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(p.brand) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(p.description) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) AND p.category_name = #{category} AND p.brand = #{brand}
AND CASE WHEN CAST(#{inStock} AS boolean) = true THEN p.stock_status != 'OUT_OF_STOCK' ELSE p.stock_status = 'OUT_OF_STOCK' END
AND p.base_price >= CAST(#{minPrice} AS decimal) AND p.base_price <= CAST(#{maxPrice} AS decimal) AND (LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) OR LOWER(p.brand) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_product p
AND p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
